overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic neon-lit metro station, boarding a train car with other passengers, and riding through Night City while observing the cyberpunk urban landscape and industrial districts through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro station concourse with digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the station platform past neon advertisements and other passengers waiting near the circular planter

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress standing near the circular planter tree

entered.detail: large digital advertisement screen displaying Militech branding and a vehicle
digital advertisement banner for Quadra vehicles above the platform
large illuminated yellow neon sign spelling MEMORY on the curved wall
circular raised planter containing a small tree inside the station concourse
futuristic black benches for passengers along the platform edge

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a cyberpunk metro station concourse illuminated by yellow neon signs and digital billboards for Militech and Quadra. The space features a circular planter with a tree and scattered passengers waiting near the platform edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro train car interior with passengers

events.description: player boards the train and moves through the aisle to find a standing position

agents.ego_description: entering the train car and standing near a support pole while observing other passengers seated on the benches

notable_agents.action: woman wearing a hat seated and looking at her phone

entered.detail: padded green bench seats along the sides of the train car
yellow vertical support pole for standing passengers to hold
red advertisement poster with gold emblem reading THIS YEAR
sliding metal doors at the end of the train car section
screen displaying animated advertisements above the windows

segments.scene_description: The player enters the train car, leaving the platform behind. Inside, the car features yellow support poles, green bench seating, and digital advertisement screens. A woman in a hat sits nearby looking at her phone while the train remains stationary at the platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: train interior during departure and acceleration

events.description: train doors close and the train begins to accelerate out of the station
train exits the enclosed station and enters an open-air elevated track section

agents.ego_description: standing in the accelerating train holding the support pole as the vehicle departs the station

entered.detail: concrete and metal building facades visible through the train windows as it moves
metal support beams and railway tracks of the elevated line

segments.scene_description: The train doors close and the vehicle accelerates out of the station, transitioning from the platform to an elevated track. Through the windows, urban buildings and track infrastructure begin to stream by as the train gains speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train traversing urban industrial district with city views

events.description: train passes a building with large NCTR signage and American flags visible on the facade

agents.ego_description: observing the sprawling cityscape through the window while the train travels at high speed above the industrial district

entered.detail: large industrial structures with pipes and machinery visible below the elevated tracks
tall residential and commercial towers of Night City skyline
blue and red illuminated NCTR sign mounted on a building facade
hazy mountains visible on the horizon beyond the urban sprawl

segments.scene_description: The train travels at high speed along elevated tracks through Night City's industrial district, passing towering high-rises, the NCTR building, and distant mountains visible through the hazy afternoon atmosphere. The interior elements fade from view as the camera focuses on the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the enclosed neon glow of a metro station into the expansive, hazy industrial skyline of Night City. It begins by moving through a station concourse filled with yellow neon signs and digital billboards, passing a circular planter and waiting passengers toward the platform edge. As the camera enters the train car, the environment shifts to a confined interior of green benches and yellow support poles where a passenger sits quietly before the doors close. The scene then accelerates away from the station, transitioning from the stationary platform to an elevated track as urban infrastructure begins to stream past the windows. Finally, the focus shifts entirely outward as the train speeds through the industrial district, passing towering high-rises and the NCTR building against a backdrop of distant mountains.
